# TechJournal (techjournal.it) - LLM Access Guide

Site: https://www.techjournal.it
Type: Italian technology news website
Primary language: it-IT

## Canonical discovery
- Sitemap: https://www.techjournal.it/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.techjournal.it/robots.txt
- Feed: https://www.techjournal.it/feed.xml

## Machine-readable endpoints
- API catalog: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/api-catalog
- Agent skills: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- Agent card: https://www.techjournal.it/.well-known/agent.json
- API status: https://www.techjournal.it/api/status

## API and docs
- Service description: https://www.techjournal.it/api
- Service docs: https://www.techjournal.it/docs

## Content negotiation
- Article pages support markdown when request header includes:
  Accept: text/markdown
- Scope: article detail pages only

## Key sections
- Home: https://www.techjournal.it/
- Search: https://www.techjournal.it/search
- Price Radar: https://www.techjournal.it/price-radar

## Notes for crawlers and agents
- Respect robots directives and crawl responsibly.
- Prefer canonical URLs and structured data where available.
- For near-real-time API availability, check /api/status before bulk requests.
